issue: Difficulty: ❌ EASY - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-flask-signalbox-configs for the Python HARD gate by adding requires_when and unless_requires_when cascade semantics (positional requires gates on merged cross-track when maps, not presence-only). Added BUL-AW/BUL-AX/BUL-AY bulletin rows in seed_evidence.py, updated helpers.py and solution/repair_cartridge.py resolution, instruction.md, two new pytest cases, platform-revision r29 in Dockerfile, and refreshed submission explanations/rubric.
